nasb.text: Dodai the Ahohite and his division had charge of the division for the second month, Mikloth being the chief officer; and in his division were 24,000.

esv.text: Dodai the Ahohite was in charge of the division of the second month; in his division were 24,000.

cnv.text: 負責二月那一班的是亞哈希人朵代，他那一班還有副官密基羅，他那一班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 亚哈希人朵代负责二月的班次，他的副官是密基罗，他班内有两万四千人。
